context: Tests whether the CryptoKit skill covers current iOS 26 post-quantum APIs without stale Secure Enclave claims.

checklist.name: Hybrid HPKE
checklist.description: Recommends XWingMLKEM768X25519 or .XWingMLKEM768X25519_SHA256_AES_GCM_256 for hybrid quantum-secure HPKE when public-key encryption is needed.

checklist.name: ML-KEM
checklist.description: Names MLKEM768 or MLKEM1024 for key encapsulation and explains encapsulate/decapsulate at the correct level.

checklist.name: ML-DSA
checklist.description: Names MLDSA65 or MLDSA87 for post-quantum digital signatures.

checklist.name: Availability
checklist.description: States that SHA-3 and post-quantum CryptoKit APIs require iOS 26+ availability checks unless the deployment target is iOS 26+.

checklist.name: Secure Enclave distinction
checklist.description: Distinguishes classical Secure Enclave P256 signing/key agreement from iOS 26 SecureEnclave.MLKEM and SecureEnclave.MLDSA variants on supported hardware.

checklist.name: Size tradeoffs
checklist.description: Warns that post-quantum keys, ciphertexts, and signatures are much larger than P256 or Curve25519 artifacts.
